title: IIT Kharagpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate I Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur) has released the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for the Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.V.Sc, B.Pharm, B.E/ B.Tech, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Kharagpur Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply online for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a lis...
